meta.title: PraxisAcademy AI | AI Workshops, Coaching & Automation
meta.description: Hands-on AI training for your business. Workshops, 1:1 coaching, and automation. Industry-agnostic, jargon-free, immediately actionable.

hero.title: Master AI.
hero.subtitle: Bring your real tasks, we show you live how AI solves them. Hands-on workshops, 1:1 coaching, and automation for every industry.

services.title: Three Paths to Greater Efficiency with AI

workshop.title: AI Workshops
workshop.description: Team-based workshops for up to 12 participants. Modular structure across multiple days, from fundamentals to deep-dive.

coaching.title: 1:1 AI Coaching
coaching.description: Individual coaching sessions via Zoom. 60 or 90 minutes, flexibly bookable as single sessions or packages.

automatisierung.title: AI Automation
automatisierung.description: Project-based automation of your business processes. Custom solutions after initial consultation, no monthly retainers.

industries.title: For every industry that works with knowledge and communication

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.description: 30 minutes, remote, no obligation. We analyze your processes and show concrete automation potential.

step2.title: Custom Proposal
step2.description: Based on your requirements, you receive a tailored proposal for workshop, coaching, or automation.

step3.title: Workshop, Coaching or Automation
step3.description: We implement together: hands-on, tailored to your real tasks, with immediately measurable results.

footer.description: Hands-on AI training, coaching, and automation for businesses across every industry.

aboutPage.title: Two Founders. One Mission.
aboutPage.subtitle: We make AI understandable and usable. For every company, every industry, every team.

anjuli.name: Anjuli Hertle
anjuli.bio: Anjuli combines strategic thinking with practical AI application. She develops the Academy's workshop concepts and coaching methodology.

samantha.name: Samantha Meyer
samantha.bio: Samantha is an expert in process automation and technical implementation. She leads the Academy's automation projects.

values.title: Hands-On
values.description: No theory lectures. We work with your real tasks and show immediately actionable solutions.

values.title: Industry-Agnostic
values.description: Our methods work across every industry, from law firms to trades.

values.title: Bilingual
values.description: We work in German and English, for teams in the DACH region and internationally.

values.title: No Tech Jargon
values.description: We explain AI so that everyone on the team can understand and apply it.

aboutPage.sisterText: PraxisNova AI is our sister company, specializing in AI automation for real estate, trades, and construction companies in Germany.

calculatorPage.title: Discover Your Savings Potential
calculatorPage.subtitle: 5 questions, 2 minutes, and you'll know how much time and money AI can save your business.

q1.label: What industry do you work in?

q2.label: How many employees does your company have?

q3.label: How many hours per week does your team spend on administrative/repetitive tasks?

q4.label: Which processes would you like to automate?

q5.label: What tools do you currently use?

calculatorPage.disclaimer: This estimate is based on industry averages and serves as a guideline.
calculatorPage.resultCta: Book a free consultation for a detailed analysis

impressumPage.title: Legal Notice
impressumPage.disclaimerText: Despite careful content review, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
impressumPage.copyrightText: The content and works on these pages created by the site operators are subject to German copyright law.

datenschutzPage.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutzPage.s1Text: The data controller for this website is PraxisAcademy AI, represented by Anjuli Hertle and Samantha Meyer.
datenschutzPage.s2Title: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
datenschutzPage.s2Text: When visiting our website, information is automatically collected by server logs. No IP addresses are stored.
datenschutzPage.s3Text: When you contact us via email or form, your information is stored to process your inquiry.
datenschutzPage.s4Text: We use an anonymous visitor identifier (UUID) in localStorage. No third-party cookies are set. Analytics cookies are only activated with your consent.
datenschutzPage.s5Text: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Contact us at info@praxisacademyai.com.
datenschutzPage.s6Text: We use the double opt-in procedure. You can unsubscribe at any time via an HMAC-signed link. Processor: Brevo (Sendinblue GmbH).
datenschutzPage.s7Text: We use the following third-party services: Vercel (hosting), HubSpot (CRM), Brevo (email marketing). All providers comply with GDPR requirements.
